prompt: I need to understand how this data pipeline works. Explore the codebase and write a clear explanation to answer.md covering: what the Pipeline struct does, how filters are applied, what the Filter trait requires of implementations, and how scheduling integrates with processing. Include the key types and their relationships.

goals.description: Use symbols/codemap to explore, then write the answer. No bash searching, no read-first. 4-6 turns.
